projects.project_description: Synthetic project used to test voice-assisted construction reporting for one residential apartment building.

sites.site_description: Residential property site containing the modelled building Triolintie 2B.

workTypes.name: General construction
workTypes.description: General building work, coordination, and non-specialist repairs.

workTypes.name: Painting and surface finishing
workTypes.description: Painting, touch-up work, and wall or ceiling surface corrections.
example_issues_en: paint is damaged beside the window

workTypes.name: Plumbing
workTypes.description: Pipes, drains, water fixtures, toilets, sinks, and visible leaks.
example_issues_en: water is leaking under the sink

workTypes.name: Electrical work
workTypes.description: Sockets, switches, lighting, wiring, cables, and electrical safety.
example_issues_en: the ceiling light does not work

workTypes.name: HVAC and ventilation
workTypes.description: Ventilation terminals, airflow, heating, cooling, and HVAC adjustments.
example_issues_en: there is no airflow from the vent

workTypes.name: Tiling
workTypes.description: Wall and floor tiles, grout, and tile finishing.
example_issues_en: grout is missing beside the shower

workTypes.name: Sealing and waterproofing
workTypes.description: Silicone joints, sealants, waterproofing, thresholds, and wet-area sealing.
example_issues_en: silicone is missing around the shower
the balcony door seal is damaged

workTypes.name: Doors and windows
workTypes.description: Doors, windows, handles, locks, hinges, seals, and adjustments.
example_issues_en: the balcony door does not close

workTypes.name: Cleaning
workTypes.description: Construction cleaning, dust removal, waste removal, and final cleaning.
example_issues_en: construction dust remains in the bedroom
waste must be removed from the corridor

workTypes.name: Flooring
workTypes.description: Laminate, parquet, vinyl, floor surfaces, skirting boards, and floor repairs.

companies.company_description: Main contractor responsible for site coordination and general construction.
Painting and apartment-level surface correction contractor.
Electrical installation, finishing, and safety contractor.
HVAC and ventilation installation and adjustment contractor.
Door and window installation and adjustment specialist.
Flooring, laminate, parquet, and skirting-board repair specialist.

projectCompanyContext.responsibility_description: General building work, coordination, and repairs not assigned to a specialist subcontractor.

users.user_description: Painting foreman responsible for apartment finishing work.
Electrical worker who may also report issues outside the electrical trade.
Plumbing technician working in apartment kitchens and wet areas.
Cleaning supervisor who can identify finishing and safety issues during handover cleaning.
